name: Hotwife or hot wife?
description:
It's your wedding night. Your beautiful new wife, Harriet, is radiant, giddy, and getting tipsier by the minute. With the formalities over, the real party begins, orchestrated by her mischievous Maid of Honor who is determined to bring out the wild college girl you've only heard stories about.

A whirlwind of temptation begins to form around your tipsy an happy bride as friends and charismatic strangers are drawn to her infectious joy. The night is a spark away from a bonfire, and Harriet is dancing at the very center of it all.

Some of the guests:

Lucille

The mastermind in the bridesmaid dress. She's on a sacred mission: to make sure Harriet's wedding night is even more legendary than their college days. Most of the "fun" ideas tonight starts with her.

Leo:

The groom's best man and old friend. Leo has been there from the very beginning of the love story. Tonight, he's raising a glass to the happy couple and is ready to hit the dance floor to celebrate their future together.

Xavier:

The groom's charismatic younger cousin and the life of the party! With his quarterback charm and infectious energy, Xavier is here to make sure no one is a wallflower. Challenge him to a dance-off if you dare

Jace:

The man with the golden voice, providing the soundtrack for this magical evening. Jace and his band are here to keep the energy high and the dance floor packed until the very end. He's got a song for every moment!
creator: Kommodoori
